Typically attributes are added, not subtracted.

expires.description: A date in the format of yyyy-MM-dd

salesOrderNo.description: The sales order number associated with the package.

purchaseOrderNo.description: The purchase order number associated with the package.

trackingNo.description: The tracking number for the package.

Products.description: An array of products associated with each package.

ProductID.description: The product numbers in each package.

quantity.description: The quantity of products with the above product numbers in the package.

serialNo.description: The Serial Number of the Product, if applicable.

productId.description: The unique product ID of the product.

customerId.description: A custom product ID provided by the dealer, if one is on file with Kinsey’s.

manufacturerId.description: The product number provided by the manufacturer.

upc.description: The UPC/barcode assigned to this product by the manufacturer.

price.description: The current cost to the dealer to purchase this product.

map.description: The Minimum Advertised Price set by the vendor.

quantityOnHand.description: The total amount of available inventory for the product.

RestockETA.description: The estimated timeline before additional stock is acquired, if applicable.

Warehouses.description: A list of warehouses and inventory levels.

recordsCount.description: The total number of products returned in the query.

productId.description: The Product ID of the product to add to the order.

description.description: (optional) Setting this overwrites the default item description on the sales line

quantity.description: The quantity of the products to add to the order.

customPrice.description: Dealer's price to show on customer packing slip. Typically used by dropship dealers to show what the customer paid and not what the dealer paid.

comment.description: A comment to add to each specific product in the array.

productID.description: The product ID of the product.

qtyOrd.description: The quantity ordered of the product.

qtyRes.description: The quantity reserved of the product.

qtyBO.description: The amount of this product on backorder.

status.description: The status of the order modification; refer to the key page for more details.

message.description: A plain text error message shown when the status does not equal 7200.

backOrdersAllowed.description: True/False. Enables backordering if products when there is insufficient quantity available.

splitOrdersAllowed.description: True/False. Allows the system to create multiple sales orders when there is insufficient inventory in the primary warehouse.

purchaseOrderNo.description: The dealer provided purchase order number. Limited to 20 characters.

shippingCarrier.description:
The requested shipping carrier ie: FEDEX, UPS, USPS, ect… This field will only be utilized if your 
            account is a non-flat rate account.Please reference the Shipping Carrier table in the Additional Information section for
            more information

shippingService.description:
The requested shipping service for the respective carrier, ie: Ground, 2 Day Air, ect… This field will only be
            utilized if your account is a non-flat rate account.Please reference the Shipping Services By Carrier section in the
            Additional Information section for more information. Limited to 10 characters.

comment.description: Creates a note on the sales order, rather than the individual sales lines.

primaryWarehouse.description: The warehouse favored by the dealer. Only utilized if the dealer is not on the flat rate shipping program.

orderLines.description: An array of products in the order

adultSignature.description: Used to specify "Adult Signature Required" on UPS options.

name.description: The name on the shipment. API will reject anything above 100 characters and will trim to 35 characters

address.description: Address line one for the shipment. Limited to 100 characters.

address2.description: Address line two for the shipment. Limited to 50 characters

city.description: The city of the shipping address. Limited to 30 characters

state.description: The state of the shipping address. Limited to 2 characters if shipping to US, limited to 20 for all other countries. Required if shipping to the US.

zipCode.description: The zip code of the shipping address. Limited to 20 characters. Required if shipping to the US.

country.description: The country of the shipping address. Must be a 2 character ISO code.

endDateTime.description: The end date from your query.

quantityOnHand.description: The inventory count specifically for the designated warehouse.

info.title: Kinsey's: Customer API
info.description:
<sub>_Document was last generated on 2026-06-05._</sub>

# Base URL
The base URL for all API requests is `https://api.kinseysinc.com/v2/`.

# Authentication
Kinsey's will assign a unique ID (API Identifier) to each dealer, which should be included with every query for authentication
purposes.

# Headers
All headers will be consistent across every endpoint, unless otherwise specified. JSON is the only accepted content type at this
time.
- `Content-Type` Application/JSON
- `X-API-KEY` Your API key, obtained from Kinsey's
- `Kinsey-Source` (optional) Used by integrators to identify where the request is coming from. For example, Shopify, BigCommerce, Custom, etc. This informational field helps with troubleshooting.

# Error handling
All API endpoints use the following error codes unless otherwise specified:
- `400 Bad Request`: The request was malformed or missing required parameters.
- `403 Forbidden`: The provided API key was invalid or missing.
- `404 Not Found`: The requested resource was not found.
- `405 Method Not Allowed`: The method is not allowed, and it could be triggered by a bad query.
- `500 Internal Server Error`: An unexpected error occurred on the server

# Additional Information

## Status Codes
| Codes | Status | Message | 
| ----- | ------ | ------- | 
| 7200 | Good | No error, everything is working properly. |
| 7202 | Error | Internal Error - Product cannot be reserved. |
| 7203 | Error | Internal Error - Product cannot be reserved. |
| 7204 | Error | Internal Error - Sales Line Comment could not be written. |
| 7250 | Error | Not enough quantity remains to fulfill requested quantity. Reduced quantity from X to Y. |
| 7404 | Warning | Product is not a valid Product. |
| 7405 | Warning | Product is out of stock and cannot be backordered. |
| 7406 | Warning | Product is discontinued and cannot be backordered. |
| 7409 | Warning | Product is restricted from purchase by this customer. |
| 7410 | Warning | Product cannot be added to the same sales order as long guns or other accessories. |
| 7450 | Warning | Product is discontinued and not enough quantity remains to fulfill requested quantity. |
| 7455 | Warning | Product is out of stock and cannot be backordered. |
| 7500 | Error | Internal Error - Unknown. |
| 7501 | Error | Internal Error - Sales Line Not Written. |

## Valid Warehouse Locations
| API Warehouse Response | Physical Location | 
| ---------------------- | ----------------- |
| WH1658 | 1658 Steel Way Mount Joy, PA 17552 |
| WH1679 | 1679 Steel Way Mount Joy, PA 17552 |
| WH250 | 250 Terry Blvd Louisville, KY 40229 |

## Valid Shipping Carriers
| APICarrierCode | Description |
| -- | -- |
| UPS | United Parcel Service |
| FEDEX | FedEx |
| USPS | United States Postal Service |

## Shipping Services by Carrier

### Shipping services for UPS
| APIServiceCode | Description |
| -- | -- |
| GROUND  | UPS Ground |
| EXPRESS  | UPS Express |
| EXPRESS_PLUS  | UPS Express Plus |
| 2ND_DAY_AIR_A | .M. UPS 2nd Day Air A.M. |
| 2ND_DAY_AIR  | UPS 2nd Day Air |
| NEXT_DAY_AIR_SAVER  | UPS Next Day Air Saver |
| NEXT_DAY_AIR  | UPS Next Day Air |
| NEXT_DAY_AIR_EARLY  | UPS Next Day Air Early |
| 3_DAY_SELECT  | UPS 3 Day Select Air |
| GFP  | UPS Ground with Freight Pricing |
| 2ND_DAY_AIR_PR  | UPS 2nd Day Air Puerto Rico |
| SAVER_CANADA  | UPS Canadian Economy |
| STANDARD  | UPS Standard Canada |
| EXPEDITED_CANADA  | UPS Expedited Canada |
| NEXT_DAY_AIR_PR  | UPS Next Day Air Puerto Rico |
| GROUND_PR  | UPS Ground Puerto Rico |

### Shipping services for FedEx
| APIServiceCode | Description |
| -- | -- |
| 2_DAY_AM | FedEx 2 Day Delivery by 10:30AM |
| 2_DAY | FedEx 2 Day Delivery |
| 1_DAY_FREIGHT | FedEx 1 Day Freight (Palletized) |
| 2_DAY_FREIGHT | FedEx 2 Day Freight (Palletized) |
| 3_DAY_FREIGHT | FedEx 3 Day Freight (Palletized) |
| EXPRESS_SAVER | FedEx Express Saver 3 Day |
| FIRST_OVERNIGHT | FedEx First Overnight |
| FIRST_FREIGHT | FedEx First Overnight Freight |
| FREIGHT_ECONOMY | FedEx Freight Economy |
| FREIGHT_PRIORITY | FedEx Freight Priority |
| GROUND | FedEx Ground |
| GROUND_HOME_DELIVERY | FedEx Ground Home Delivery ($4 Surcharge) |
| PRIORITY_OVERNIGHT | FedEx Priority Overnight |
| SMART_POST | FedEx Smart Post |
| STANDARD_OVERNIGHT | FedEx Standard Overnight |
| INTERNATIONAL_PRIORITY_FREIGHT | FedEx International Priority Freight |
| INTERNATIONAL_ECONOMY | FedEx International Economy |
| INTERNATIONAL_ECONOMY_FREIGHT | FedEx International Economy Freight |
| INTERNATIONAL_FIRST | FedEx International First Class |
| INTERNATIONAL_PRIORITY | FedEx International Priority |
| INTERNATIONAL_GROUND | FedEx International Ground |

### Shipping services for USPS
| APIServiceCode | Description |
| -- | -- |
| GROUND-ADVANTAGE | USPS Ground Advantage (under 2 lbs) |
| EXPRESS-PARCEL | USPS Priority Mail Express Parcel |
| FIRST-PARCEL | USPS First Class Mail Parcel |
| PRIORITY-PARCEL | USPS Priority Mail Parcel |

parameters.name: products
parameters.description:
(optional): Filter by product ID, with each product separated by commas. 
            A maximum of 2000 characters is allowed for this value, including the commas.
            If this parameter is omitted then all products available for sale to the dealer will be returned (very large file).

get.description:
Provides a comprehensive and detailed catalog of all the products currently carried by Kinsey’s. 
            Depending on a dealers approval status with the manufacturer not all products may actually be available for purchase by individual dealers.

​

The response is a JSON object containing an extensive set of fields related to the current catalog of products for sale. 
            The attributes contained within this file may change from time to time depending upon products being carried. 
            Typically attributes are added, not subtracted.

Provides a detailed catalog of the requested products currently carried by Kinsey’s. 
            Depending on a dealers approval status with the manufacturer not all products may actually be available for purchase by individual dealers.

​

The response is a JSON object containing an extensive set of fields related to the requested products for sale.
            The attributes contained within this file may change from time to time depending upon products being carried. 
            Typically attributes are added, not subtracted.

parameters.name: products
parameters.description: Filter by product ID, with each product separated by commas.

get.description:
Returns the entire output of the `/Products` endpoint as a JSON file.

​

Upon completion, the server will return a successful status, initiating an automatic download of the JSON file to your computer. 
            The response will be the same as the `/Products` call with the exception that data will be returned in the form of a file rather than as text in the API response.

get.summary: Gets a list of all purchaseable products via API
get.description: This is a limited list of allowed products. It may be more restrictive than placing an order over the phone - please contact your rep with any questions.

parameters.name: products
parameters.description:
(optional): Filter by product ID, with each product separated by commas. 
            A maximum of 2000 characters is allowed for this value, including the commas.
            If this parameter is omitted then all allowed products will be returned.

post.description: Adds a new sales order to the system. All parameters for this end point are supplied in the body.

patch.description:
Modify an existing sales order. 
**Note that lines can only be added if the order has not been released to the warehouse for processing.**

delete.description:
This endpoint is used to delete a pending sales order. 
**Note that orders can only be deleted if the order has not been released to the warehouse for picking.**

parameters.name: salesOrderNo
parameters.description: The order number of the sale.

get.summary: Get the status of an order
get.description: This endpoint retrieves the status of a provided sales order

parameters.name: salesOrderNo
parameters.description: The order number for the sale. This is the order number assigned by Kinsey’s, not the dealer assigned Purchase Order Number.

get.summary: Retrieve shipping details of package(s) based on purchase order number or a date range.
get.description:
If you submit both a purchase order number and a date range as parameters then the date range will be ignored.

​

If both startDate and endDate are set, they cannot be more than 5 days apart.

If endDate is not supplied, endDate defaults to 2 hours from given startDate.

​

Dates must be formatted in ISO 8601, UTC `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ`.

parameters.name: purchaseOrderNo
parameters.description: The order number for the sale. Limited to 20 characters. Must be URI encoded.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: The start date for searching shipping information.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: The end date for your search. No more than 5 days after the start date.

The base URL for all API requests is `https://api.kinseysinc.com/v2/`.

# Authentication
Kinsey's will assign a unique ID (API Identifier) to each dealer, which should be included with every query for authentication

# Headers
All headers will be consistent across every endpoint, unless otherwise specified. JSON is the only accepted content type at this

- `Kinsey-Source` (optional) Used by integrators to identify where the request is coming from. For example, Shopify, BigCommerce, Custom, etc. This informational field helps with troubleshooting.

# Error handling
All API endpoints use the following error codes unless otherwise specified:
- `400 Bad Request`: The request was malformed or missing required parameters.
- `403 Forbidden`: The provided API key was invalid or missing.
- `404 Not Found`: The requested resource was not found.
- `405 Method Not Allowed`: The method is not allowed, and it could be triggered by a bad query.

# Additional Information

## Status Codes
| Codes | Status | Message |

| 7200 | Good | No error, everything is working properly. |
